g.title: Box.1020
g.text: Aria Operations receives alarms from compute vCenter

g.title: Box.1053
g.text: Generate API call with alert data

g.title: Box.1070
g.text: Send SOAP request to generate Event

g.title: Box.1082
g.text: SOAP request mandatory dataeventId = unique id of event, i.e. ATF-DHC-1-vROPS-<12 digits>eventSender = SNOW event sender, i.e. ATF-DHC-1eventType = PERFORMANCE, AVAILABILITY, HEARTBEATeventSenderType = ATF-VCSeventClass = subcategory for events, equals vROPS adapter typeeventHostname = vROps alert’s resource name, i.e. fth01tss002eventMessage = vROps alert’s messageeventSeverity = critical ciId = configuration item ID from CMDB, i.e. SNC.G.C01.029198117timeOccured = timestamp with ISO format, i.e. 2022-07-27T11:31:15+00:00timeSent = timestamp with ISO format, i.e. 2022-07-27T11:31:15+00:00ciType = CIID, EXT_IDciSource = dhc://1category = SNOW support group name, i.e. Cloud.IaaS.DHC
